positive: A celestial mountainscape at twilight, depicting stylized, geometrically precise crystalline peaks emerging from an abstract nebula cloud. The mountains should have clean, bold silhouettes against a highly contrasting deep indigo and burnt orange gradient sky. Incorporate glowing, bioluminescent accents and minimal constellations rendered in sharp, clean lines. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a symmetrical apparel print. Flat graphic design elements mixed with soft, watercolor-like gradients, maximal contrast, high detail, vector art style, clean lines, deep matte finish.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logos, copyrighted, lowres, sketch, gradient text
